message:
feat(search): wire tsearch/tfind/tdelete to core LLRB (bd-srch-2)

Sub-bead 2 of bd-srch-epic. Replaces the unbalanced BST in
frankenlibc-abi/src/search_abi.rs with a thin shim over the
LLRB tree added in bd-srch-1.

Changes:
- search_abi.rs: tsearch/tfind/tdelete/twalk/twalk_r now delegate
  to frankenlibc_core::search::RbTree<OpaqueKey>. Removed the
  legacy TreeNode struct + tdelete_recursive + twalk_recursive
  + twalk_r_recursive. *rootp points to a heap-allocated
  RbTreeBox{tree} when the tree is non-empty, NULL when empty
  (POSIX-defined opaque). Returned pointer is &OpaqueKey
  (#[repr(transparent)] over *const c_void) so casting to void**
  + deref yields the user's key per POSIX.
- core/search/rb_tree.rs: added PosixVisit enum (PreOrder/
  PostOrder/EndOrder/Leaf) + walk_posix() method that emits the
  POSIX twalk 3-visits-per-internal / 1-visit-per-leaf pattern.
- core/search/mod.rs: re-export PosixVisit.
- conformance_diff_search.rs: added fl_tsearch_insert_then_
  tfind_returns_match (7-key round-trip + missing-key NULL +
  tdelete-all → root NULL) and fl_tsearch_ascending_inserts_
  balanced_via_llrb (1024 ascending inserts then tfind all).

Tests: 12 core unit tests (incl new walk_posix test) + 7
conformance tests pass. Public ABI signatures unchanged.

Closes bd-srch-2; bd-srch-3 will add tdestroy.
